title: Epilepsy Netherite
description: Makes ancient debris easier to spot with flashing colors.
body:
# WARNING! Flickering images!
Makes ancient debris flash rainbow colors extremely quickly, making it easier to spot.


<details>
<summary>Warning!!!!!! Flashing Colors!</summary>

![Ancient debris flashing bright colors (slowed down)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c487b6947e0d2e7aedde825acee2aa546cfa2d0.gif)

(The gif has been slowed down. In game it will go as fast as the game allows)

</details>
